scope: Objective-event response assessment reasons in After Action
Objective-event lesson tags in After Action
Objective-event lesson tags carried into unit history and tactical lessons
Desktop QA only; mobile is outside the current target
flow: Clicked 選抜部隊で戦闘開始.
Set battle speed to 3倍 and waited for objective-event alerts.
Clicked 視界点奪回・観測復旧 from the 視界点: 観測点沈黙 alert.
Verified After Action objective-event assessment reason and lesson tag.
Applied the result to Army Camp.
Selected 第4戦列歩兵大隊 and verified the carried objective-event lesson.
observations: After Action included 目標イベント対応.
After Action included the assessment reason 到着が遅く目標圏外に留まった.
After Action included 教訓 到着遅延.
Army Camp selected-unit view showed the carried lesson as 目標イベント対応1件 / 得意遅滞節約.
The initial Army Camp selection did not show the target history because it selected a different brigade; selecting the responding brigade exposed the expected carried lesson.
notes: Browser DOM snapshot was unavailable in this in-app browser environment in a previous pass, so QA used unique button locators and read-only DOM evaluation through the documented browser API.
Mobile QA was intentionally skipped because the current goal excludes cellphone/mobile support.
